updates.title: ITR filing 2026: Received dividend income or bonus shares? Here’s how they are taxed and reported
updates.summary: Investors receiving dividend income or bonus shares must consider tax implications while filing ITR. Dividends are now taxable in the hands of investors, subject to slab rates and TDS if over  ₹10,000. Bonus shares are tax-free upon receipt but result in taxable capital gains upon sale. Details here.
